context.project: XH-202630 科研文献智能助手 — 领域知识个性化生成与多智能体协同决策系统研究
context.milestone: FM3：论文分析与对比页面完成
context.requirement: agentStore 完整实现（FM1 已部分实现，需补强）：(1) 6 个 Agent 状态初始化（coordinator/retriever/analyzer/comparer/generator/reviewer 默认 waiting）；(2) progress 进度计算（completed/total，含 reviewer 失败重试语义）；(3) durationMs 累加；(4) 错误聚合 errors 数组；(5) bulkSetStates 批量更新（应对 SSE 高频事件）；(6) getCompletedAgents / getActiveAgents / getFailedAgents 派生；(7) 完整类型导出 AgentName 联合类型；(8) resetStates 完善（含 errors/durationMs 清空）。

reference_docs.path: docs/frontend/前端模块系统架构文档.md
reference_docs.purpose: agentStore 规范（9.1.4 节）、6-Agent 工作流

related_modules.description: 当前已有 agentStates/flowData/isConnected/currentAnalysisId + updateAgentState/resetStates + agentStatesList/activeAgents/progress；缺 6-Agent 初始化/errors/批量更新

existing_implementations.description: Pinia setup store：agentStates: Record<string, AgentState>、updateAgentState(name, partial)、resetStates()、progress = completed/total

relevant_modules.name: agentStore
relevant_modules.responsibility: Agent 状态管理 + 进度计算 + 错误聚合

key_interfaces.name: initStates
key_interfaces.description: 初始化 6 个 Agent 状态为 waiting

files_to_modify.description: 扩展 agentStore：AgentName 联合类型 + initStates + bulkSetStates + errors + 派生 completed/failed/durationMs + resetStates 完善
导出 AgentName 联合类型 + AgentStatus 联合类型 + AGENT_NAMES 常量数组 + 默认初始状态 DEFAULT_AGENT_STATE

functional_requirements.description: types/agent.ts 扩展：export const AGENT_NAMES = ['coordinator', 'retriever', 'analyzer', 'comparer', 'generator', 'reviewer'] as const；export type AgentName = typeof AGENT_NAMES[number]；export type AgentStatus = 'waiting' | 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed'；export const DEFAULT_AGENT_STATE: AgentState = { name: 'coordinator', status: 'waiting' }
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 类型与常量导出；联合类型 6 个值

functional_requirements.description: agentStore 引入 AGENT_NAMES/AgentName/AgentStatus。新增 initStates(analysisId: string)：清空 agentStates + 写入 6 个默认 waiting 状态；isConnected=false；currentAnalysisId=analysisId；errors=[]；totalDurationMs=0
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 调用后 agentStates 含 6 个 waiting 状态

functional_requirements.description: 新增 bulkSetStates(states: Array<{ name: AgentName; partial: Partial<AgentState> }>)：循环更新每个 Agent 状态；state.status 变化到 'failed' 时记录 { agent: name, error: partial.error ?? 'unknown', timestamp: Date.now() } 到 errors；累计 durationMs 到 totalDurationMs（仅在 completed/failed 时累加）
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 批量更新原子；errors 自动聚合；durationMs 累加

functional_requirements.description: 新增派生：completedCount = filter completed count；failedCount = filter failed count；getCompletedAgents = filter；getFailedAgents = filter；getActiveAgents = filter running（已存在 activeAgents）；totalDurationMs = ref<number>(0)
保持向后兼容：updateAgentState(name, partial) 调用 bulkSetStates([{name, partial}])；agentStatesList/activeAgents/progress 保持现有签名

cross_system_consistency.data_flow: SSE agent_state_update → useSSE/sessionStore → agentStore.updateAgentState → bulkSetStates 聚合 errors

frontend.rule: Store 状态变更不直接操作 DOM

frontend.approach: SSE 事件无 name 时 console.warn 后忽略

forbidden_actions.reason: 保持 type/agent.ts 与 SSE 事件一致

forbidden_actions.action: 在 agentStore 中调用 API

unit_tests.description: initStates 后 6 个 waiting；currentAnalysisId 正确
任一状态 failed 时 errors 增加一条；totalDurationMs 累加
reset 后所有 ref 归零

verification_commands.command: cd Veritas/frontend && npx vitest run src/__tests__/stores/agentStore.spec.ts

acceptance_criteria.criterion: AgentName 联合类型 6 个值正确
initStates 写入 6 个 waiting 状态
bulkSetStates 错误聚合 + durationMs 累加正确
updateAgentState 行为不变（向后兼容）
